text:
is a song from Evangelion: 3.0+1.0 Thrice Upon A Time. It is track 2 in the album Music from "Shin Evangelion": Evangelion: 3.0+1.0, disc 2. https://vgmdb.net/album/107287 

Lyrics

 
Everyone's out to get me
I can tell by
The shifting eyes that
Follow me
But they can't catch me
'Cause i can hear them
Snakes in the grass
Sneaking up on me
